section.heading: Acceptance of funds for harbor dredging
section.chapeau: The Secretary is authorized, in accordance with section 701h of this title, to accept and expend funds contributed by a State or other non-Federal interest—

paragraph.content: to dredge a non-Federal harbor or channel, or a marina or berthing area located adjacent to, or accessible by, such harbor or channel; or
to provide technical assistance related to the planning and design of dredging activities described in paragraph (1).

note.heading: “Secretary” Defined
note.p: Secretary means the Secretary of the Army, see section 2 of div. AA of Pub. L. 116–260, set out as a note under section 2201 of this title.
